product_overview: EGX Market Intelligence System is a deterministic, backend-only financial analysis pipeline for the Egyptian Exchange (EGX). It ingests OHLC market data, computes pivot-based technical levels and intelligence signals, and produces historical time-regime analysis for market interpretation.
core_goals: Scrape and process OHLC data for configurable EGX symbols in a deterministic pipeline
Calculate classic pivot points, support, and resistance levels with validation
Derive market bias and technical signals from price proximity to pivot levels
Maintain append-only historical context and detect multi-day market regimes
Provide a backend REST API wrapper to run the pipeline and retrieve status/results safely

features.name: Pipeline Execution Control
features.description: Allows users to start the full EGX analysis pipeline, monitor execution state, and prevent unsafe concurrent runs.
user_flows: GET /api/status -> Receive 200 with current pipeline state such as idle or running -> POST /api/run -> Receive 200 with success true and pipeline stdout after sequential engine execution completes -> GET /api/status -> Receive 200 showing completed state
POST /api/run -> Receive 500 with success false and error when the pipeline fails or an engine exits non-zero
POST /api/run while a lock file indicates an active execution -> Receive 500 with success false and an error indicating concurrent execution is blocked

features.name: Results Retrieval
features.description: Returns the final quantitative time intelligence output generated by the pipeline after successful completion.
user_flows: POST /api/run -> Receive 200 confirming pipeline completion -> GET /api/results -> Receive 200 with success true and an array of final time intelligence records
GET /api/results before any successful pipeline execution -> Receive 404 with an error indicating results are unavailable
POST /api/run -> Receive 200 after the pipeline writes final output -> GET /api/results -> Receive 200 with result data derived from the latest time intelligence file

features.name: EGX REST API Wrapper
features.description: Express server wrapping the quantitative analysis pipeline

endpoints.description: Returns the execution state of the pipeline
Executes the full EGX pipeline synchronously
Fetches the final quantitative time intelligence output
